executives.background: Phil Jasper is President of Raytheon. He previously served as President of Mission Systems at Collins Aerospace.

executives.name: Robert "Kelly" Ortberg
executives.background: Mr. Ortberg became President and Chief Executive Officer of Boeing in August 2024. He previously served as CEO of Rockwell Collins and later as CEO of Collins Aerospace after its acquisition by United Technologies.
